name: kill-tracker
description: Kill/Death Tracker — tracks player kills, deaths, and points with streaks, leaderboards, and seasonal resets.

pvpKillPoints.description: Points awarded for killing another player

mobKillPoints.description: Points awarded for killing a mob or entity

streakBonusInterval.description: Every N kills awards bonus points (see streakBonusPoints)

streakBonusPoints.description: Bonus points awarded at each streak milestone

streakBroadcast.description: Broadcast streak milestones to the server

awardCurrency.description: Also grant Takaro currency equal to points earned

leaderboardPageSize.description: Number of players per leaderboard page

killBroadcast.description: Broadcast PvP kills to the server (mob kills are not broadcast)

permissions.description: Allows a player to view kill stats and leaderboard
Allows an admin to reset kill stats for a player or all players
Count = point multiplier for this player (e.g. count=2 means 2x points)

leaderboard.helpText: View the top players ranked by points. Use /top [page] to browse pages.

resetstats.helpText: Admin command. Use /resetstats all to reset ALL stats and start a new season. Use /resetstats <player> to reset only that player's stats.

arguments.name: player
arguments.helpText: Player name to reset, or 'all' to reset all stats and start a new season.

stats.description: View your kill/death stats and rank
stats.helpText: View your personal kill stats, K/D ratio, points, streak, and current rank for the current season.

on-death.description: Track player deaths, apply death penalty, and attribute PvP kills to the attacker

on-kill.description: Track mob kills and award points when a player kills an entity
